archimate:DataObject.name: Contact Form
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: The Contact Form is a fundamental tool for collecting essential information about individuals or entities. It typically includes fields for name, contact details (like phone number and email address), and sometimes a brief message or inquiry. This form is crucial for establishing initial communication, whether for customer support, lead generation, or general inquiries, allowing businesses to gather key contact information in an organized and efficient manner.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: SV-Forms Structure
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ContactFormDataObject
ABB name: egovera:ContactFormDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/ContactFormDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/FormsStructureDataObject

properties.value: The Contact Form is a fundamental tool for collecting essential information about individuals or entities. It typically includes fields for name, contact details (like phone number and email address), and sometimes a brief message or inquiry. This form is crucial for establishing initial communication, whether for customer support, lead generation, or general inquiries, allowing businesses to gather key contact information in an organized and efficient manner.
